title: Create: potato weapons(1.19.2;1.19.4;1.20.1)
description: is one potato cannon not enough for you? This mod will add a whole arsenal of potato weapons such as revolvers, rifles and grenades!
body:
# Description
is one potato cannon not enough for you? This mod will add a whole arsenal of potato weapons, such as 
potato revolvers, rifles and grenades!Warning: mod in alpha version, some items/elements/mechanics may be changed/added/removed! Have fun!(P.S. weapons use only potato at the moment).

# Dead
This project is dead, but will be reborned (i guess)
